name: subset_trans_sets
code:
import Mathlib

theorem subset_trans_sets {α : Type*} {A B C : Set α} (h1 : A ⊆ B) (h2 : B ⊆ C) : A ⊆ C := by
  exact Set.Subset.trans h1 h2

name: mono_comp_strict
code:
import Mathlib

theorem mono_comp_strict {α β γ : Type*} [Preorder α] [Preorder β] [Preorder γ] 
  {f : β → γ} {g : α → β} (hf : StrictMono f) (hg : StrictMono g) : 
  StrictMono (f ∘ g) := by
  exact StrictMono.comp hf hg

name: bool_not_not
code:
import Mathlib

theorem bool_not_not (b : Bool) : ¬¬b = b := by
  cases b <;> simp [Bool.not_not]

name: nat_pow_pos
code:
import Mathlib

theorem nat_pow_pos (n : ℕ) : 2^n > 0 := by
  exact Nat.pos_of_ne_zero (by norm_num)

name: list_length_append
code:
import Mathlib

theorem list_length_append (A B : List α) : (A ++ B).length = A.length + B.length := by
  rw [List.length_append]

name: injective_card_le
code:
import Mathlib

theorem injective_card_le (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Injective f) : n ≤ m := by
  have h : Fintype.card (Fin n) ≤ Fintype.card (Fin m) := Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf
  simpa [Fintype.card_fin] using h

name: pow_two_ge_one
code:
import Mathlib

theorem pow_two_ge_one (n : ℕ) : 2^n ≥ 1 := by
  exact Nat.one_le_pow n 2 (by decide)

name: subset_trans_sets
code:
import Mathlib

theorem subset_trans_sets {α : Type*} {A B C : Set α} (h1 : A ⊆ B) (h2 : B ⊆ C) : A ⊆ C :=
  Set.Subset.trans h1 h2

name: card_powerset
code:
import Mathlib

theorem card_powerset (n : ℕ) (s : Finset α) (h : s.card = n) : s.powerset.card = 2^n := by
  rw [Finset.card_powerset, h]

name: infinite_primes
code:
import Mathlib

theorem infinite_primes (n : ℕ) : ∃ (p : ℕ), p > n ∧ Nat.Prime p := by
  obtain ⟨p, h_le, h_prime⟩ := Nat.exists_infinite_primes (n + 1)
  refine' ⟨p, _, h_prime⟩
  linarith

name: finset_union_comm
code:
import Mathlib

theorem finset_union_comm {α : Type*} [DecidableEq α] (A B : Finset α) : A ∪ B = B ∪ A := by
  exact Finset.union_comm A B

name: even_or_odd
code:
import Mathlib

theorem even_or_odd (n : ℕ) : Even n ∨ Odd n := by
  exact Nat.even_or_odd n

name: infinite_primes
code:
import Mathlib

theorem infinite_primes (n : ℕ) : ∃ p : ℕ, p > n ∧ Nat.Prime p := by
  obtain ⟨p, hp⟩ := Nat.exists_infinite_primes (n + 1)
  exact ⟨p, hp.1, hp.2⟩

name: exp_monotone
code:
import Mathlib

theorem exp_monotone (a b : ℕ) (h : a ≤ b) : 2^a ≤ 2^b := by
  apply Nat.pow_le_pow_right (by decide) h

name: comp_injective
code:
import Mathlib

theorem comp_injective {α β γ : Type*} (f : β → γ) (g : α → β)
    (hf : Function.Injective f) (hg : Function.Injective g) :
    Function.Injective (f ∘ g) := by
  exact Function.Injective.comp hf hg

name: surjective_card_ge
code:
import Mathlib

theorem surjective_card_ge (n m : ℕ) (f : Fin n → Fin m) (hf : Function.Surjective f) : n ≥ m := by
  have : Fintype.card (Fin n) ≥ Fintype.card (Fin m) := by
    apply Fintype.card_le_of_surjective f hf
  simpa [Fintype.card_fin] using this

name: de_morgan_not_and

import Mathlib

theorem de_morgan_not_and (P Q : Prop) : ¬(P ∧ Q) ↔ (¬P ∨ ¬Q) :=
  not_and_or

name: fintype_pigeonhole
code:
import Mathlib

theorem fintype_pigeonhole {α β : Type*} [Fintype α] [Fintype β] (f : α → β) (h : Fintype.card α > Fintype.card β) : ¬Function.Injective f := by
  intro hf
  have hcard : Fintype.card α > Fintype.card β := h
  have h_le : Fintype.card α ≤ Fintype.card β := Fintype.card_le_of_injective f hf
  exact (lt_self_iff_false _).mp (lt_of_le_of_lt h_le hcard)

name: cantor_no_surjection
code:
import Mathlib

theorem cantor_no_surjection (A : Type u) : ¬∃ f : A → Set A, Function.Surjective f := by
  intro h; obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
  have := Function.cantor_surjective f
  contradiction
